title: calophyllum pentapetalum var. cumingii
intro: Calophyllum pentapetalum var. cumingii, also known as the Green Heart tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Calophyllaceae family and is native to the Philippines. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Calophyllum pentapetalum var. cumingii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as oil and extracts, are traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, and some studies suggest potential antioxidant and cytotoxic activities.
